sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lam khial a gimna thuak hangin;
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang in.
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang leh,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ling tawh kigan lukhu khu a,
Leitung i mawh hong sawpsak ding,
Vuk sang ka ngo zawk nadingin,
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pa aw, ke’n lam ka khialzo hi,
Tui in kisawp siang zolo hi.
Keimah in na thuciam um leng,
Vuk sang ka ngo zawk nadingin,
Tuuno si tawh hong sawp siang in.
